title: Cross-link records to ewing-open-data-catalog study entries
context: Sibling-project integration: link harmonized outcome records to the corresponding study entries in ewing-open-data-catalog so the two open resources reinforce each other. Strictly aggregate, de-identified, open-access data only; no patient-level data; not medical advice.
objective: Cross-link harmonized outcome records to their corresponding ewing-open-data-catalog study entries via stable identifiers.
acceptanceCriteria: Each linkable record carries a stable cross-reference to the matching ewing-open-data-catalog study entry.
Links are validated; unmatched records are reported rather than guessed.
Cross-links remain schema-valid and pass CI gates.
output: /output/datasets/crosslinks/ record-to-catalog cross-reference table, committed to the repo.
